title: pinus renoui
side_effects: Pinus renoui can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in some individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's essential oils can also lead to nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Pinus renoui can cause liver damage and kidney failure, particularly when combined with other medications or substances. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Pinus renoui for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential health risks.
